errors.description: Required PQ renewal plan is missing or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification until the governed renewal plan is present

errors.description: Required governance policy decision metadata is missing or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification until explicit policy approval is present

errors.description: Governance policy denied PQ runtime verification.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification when policy decision is DENY
deny PQ runtime verification unless verifier mode is STUB_ONLY

errors.description: Target signature family is not allowed for runtime verification.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification until signature family is governed

errors.description: Target hash algorithm is not allowed for runtime verification.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification until hash algorithm is governed

errors.description: A previously observed PQ runtime verification record was reused.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification on replayed records

errors.description: PQ runtime verification append-only position or replay binding is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification until append-only continuity is proven

errors.description: PQ runtime verification diagnostics contain unsafe or sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ runtime verification until diagnostics are redacted and audit-safe
